# Stephen Rowley | Klaviyo Specialist for Ecommerce Brands

> Retention marketing specialist with 10+ years in marketing, working hands-on in Klaviyo every day. Helps ecommerce and D2C brands make more money from email through Klaviyo flows, campaigns, segmentation, and practical AI automations built with Claude. Remote, worldwide.

## Services

- Klaviyo audit (free): full account review covering deliverability, list health, segmentation, and flow gaps. Findings presented on a short 30-minute call within 5 business days, with a prioritized action plan the client keeps either way.
- Core flow build and rebuild: welcome series, abandoned cart and browse, post-purchase, and win-back automations. Strategy, copy, design direction, and testing, built in the client's account and owned by them.
- Campaigns and segmentation (monthly): send plans that treat VIPs, new customers, and lapsed buyers as distinct segments.
- Practical AI automations: custom tools built with Claude, including review-mining for copy, content repurposing pipelines, and self-summarizing reports.

## Credentials

All Klaviyo certifications are verifiable:

- Klaviyo Strategist Certificate: https://credential.klaviyo.com/96ea462e-4e4f-4d38-9bb7-5932eb74a4ce
- Klaviyo Practitioner Certificate: https://credential.klaviyo.com/bb6e061b-96cd-4021-92e8-ec46d2fc3a2f
- Klaviyo Deliverability Certificate: https://credential.klaviyo.com/6aa3421c-f990-4404-910e-ff8a2ece2cad
- Klaviyo Sales Certificate: https://credential.klaviyo.com/dae2058b-38d0-4109-a29c-392de684264a

## Experience

- 10+ years in marketing, specialized in retention; builds flows, campaigns, and segments in Klaviyo daily
- D2C ecommerce specialist with a background in B2B tech and finance
- Klaviyo and Shopify specialist, fluent across other ecommerce stacks
- Has worked with brands including HelloFresh, KORG, Wilkinson Sword, PishPosh Baby, and Nelson's

## Engagement model

Fixed scope and fixed price, quoted before work starts. No retainers required. The free audit is performed inside the client's Klaviyo account via Manager-level user access, using Klaviyo's official AI integration in read-only fashion; access is revocable at any time. Everything built is owned by the client.

## Contact

Via the form on the website. Audits are free with no obligation.
